name: HN Pulse
tagline: Real-time Hacker News front-page probability alerts.
audience: indie hackers launching on Hacker News
positioning: Telegram-first launch intelligence for HN submissions: score early momentum, alert on threshold crossings, and summarize calibration daily.

pricing.pulse: $19/mo: 25 watches, configurable thresholds, daily digest, acceleration alerts
pricing.pulse-pro: $49/mo: unlimited watches, webhook delivery, weekly calibration report, API key
